content.verdict: Storfjord is a hand-built log boutique hotel set on a wooded ridge above the Storfjord, fifteen minutes from Ålesund and forty-five from the cruise pier at Geiranger. With only 30 rooms, a wood-fired sauna and a complimentary house car for guests, it is the rare Norwegian fjord property that feels both private and properly luxurious. For a honeymoon, this is where you slow down: long breakfasts, sauna at sunset, fjord swims and dinners that lean hard into Sunnmøre seafood.
content.best_room: Book a Junior Suite with a private fjord-view balcony. They are the largest standard category, with hand-laid pine, deep tubs and floor-to-ceiling windows toward the water. The Honeymoon Suite has a separate sitting room and an outdoor private terrace — worth the splurge for one or two nights of the stay.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival above the Storfjord
itinerary_7_nights.description: Fly into Ålesund Vigra (AES) and take the 25-minute private transfer to Storfjord. Check into your Junior Suite, take a first sauna at dusk, then a slow Sunnmøre tasting menu in the wood-beamed dining room.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Geirangerfjord cruise
itinerary_7_nights.description: Drive the complimentary house car to Hellesylt or Geiranger and board a UNESCO-protected fjord cruise past the Seven Sisters and Bridal Veil waterfalls. Back at the hotel, a wood-fired sauna and cold dip in the fjord before dinner.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Ålesund art-nouveau day
itinerary_7_nights.description: Spend the day in nearby Ålesund — the entire town was rebuilt in art nouveau after a 1904 fire. Climb the 418 steps of Aksla viewpoint, lunch on king crab at Anno restaurant, return for an in-room dining evening.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Trollstigen serpentine drive
itinerary_7_nights.description: Drive the legendary Trollstigen pass (open May to October) — eleven hairpin bends climbing a near-vertical wall with waterfalls on every side. Picnic at the top, return via Valldal for strawberries, dinner back at Storfjord.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Kayak & sauna
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning kayak from the hotel jetty into quiet side-fjord arms with the chef's hamper aboard. Afternoon at leisure: library reading, massage in suite, and a long sauna-cold-plunge ritual before a four-course tasting menu.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Runde bird island or helicopter flightseeing
itinerary_7_nights.description: Either drive to Runde, Norway's southernmost bird cliff with puffins from May to August, or splurge on a helicopter flight over Geiranger and Hjørundfjord. Final wood-fired dinner with langoustines from the local boats.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Farewell breakfast
itinerary_7_nights.description: A long breakfast on the terrace if the weather plays, a last sauna, then transfer back to Ålesund Vigra. Many couples connect from here to Bergen or fly north to Tromsø for a Northern Lights extension.

caveats: Remote location — you need the house car or a private rental to explore beyond the hotel.
Geirangerfjord cruise season runs roughly May to early October; outside that, fjord access is limited.
Only 30 rooms; book 4-6 months ahead for high summer.
Norwegian dining is small-portioned and tasting-menu led — not a destination for hearty buffet eaters.

faqs.question: Good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: Yes — small, hand-built and fjord-side, with a sauna culture and an exceptional restaurant. Couples make up the majority of guests and the hotel is famously low-key and private.

faqs.question: Best time to visit?
faqs.answer: Late May to mid-September for long fjord days and open mountain passes. Late June for midnight-sun light at this latitude.

faqs.question: Book in advance?
faqs.answer: 4-6 months ahead for summer suites; 2-3 months in shoulder season.

faqs.question: Adults-only?
faqs.answer: No, but with only 30 rooms and a quiet wellness-led atmosphere it draws an adults-leaning clientele. Children are welcome but rare.

faqs.question: Best room type?
faqs.answer: Junior Suite with fjord-facing balcony for value, or the Honeymoon Suite with private terrace for a milestone night.

faqs.question: How to get there?
faqs.answer: Fly into Ålesund Vigra (AES), 25-minute private transfer arranged by the hotel. From Oslo, a 1-hour flight; from Bergen, 50 minutes.
